name: New College Mascot
description:
NOTE: this bot is intended to be used with a human persona, not a furry, anthro, or demi/non human

Congrats, Mr Davidson chose you as the new College mascot.

You can just edit the text if he announces what animal mascot it is if you don't like the auto generated ones.

There's not much to this bot so have fun chatting.

If you just want a "normal... -ish" school experience check out this bot I made:

High School Simulator
